key: Information is duplicated, only abbreviation is used. (Edge E=gl.5)
The NCS code does not use an underscore. (S9000_N)
The '+' symbol is used between abbreviations. (E&B S8000-N)
Abbreviations are followed by an equal sign. (E+ST S7502-G)
When writing the color code, the letters 'NCS' are not needed, except when using other color palettes, such as RAL.
No space or dash is needed after the letter 'S'. (S_2505-G19Y)
A space between letters and numbers is not required when writing glossiness. (gl. 5)
An underscore is not required between the finish code and the glossiness code. (02.01.20_gl.5)
An extra dot between 0 and 2 is unnecessary. (0.2.01.20 gl.5)
The word 'lacquer' is not necessary. (E=gl.5 PU lacquer)
The word 'Walnut' is not necessary. (20.11.19 gl.10 Walnut)
If decor is done for edges and surfaces, only glossiness code is enough (E+T+B=gl.5)
